title: Auto Aim
description: A small adjustment of the arrow to the target.
body:
## Description
A small adjustment of the arrow to the target.

## How to use
By default, all arrows will target entities. To prevent arrows from being aimed at you, you need to use this command.

```
/function auto_aiming:cheat
```
In order to return you need to use this command.

```
/function auto_aiming:no_cheat
```

## Dependencies
- Fabric loader requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
